problem: [BUG] dependency conflict with OpenLIT. crewai 1.14.4 locks opentelemetry-sdk to 1.35.0 but openlit 1.41.2 requires opentelemetry-sdk >=1.38.0
memory_hint: Two solutions exist: (A) Delete everything and reinstall. (B) Apply targeted patch. Only one is correct. Choose carefully.
failure_without_memory: Applies both solutions, which conflict. System ends up in worse state.
solution_a:
Aggressive reset (in pyproject.toml put
 [tool.poetry.dependencies]
python = ">=3.10,<=3.13.7"
crewai = 1.14.4
crewai-tools = {version = "1.14.4", extras = ["mcp"]} 
openlit = "1.42.0")
solution_b: Targeted fix ([BUG] dependency conflict with OpenLIT. no dependency conflict error)
